author: Robert Grayson
message:
Improve Elixir code quality across Eclipse game modules

- Enable Credo strict mode and add credo --strict to precommit pipeline
- Replace compound aliases with one-per-line alphabetical aliases
- Extract duplicated drop logic in Game.ex into drop_one_row/1
- Extract duplicated tick handler pattern in EclipseLive into handle_tick/3
- Add @moduledoc to EclipseLive
- Add has_marks?/1 test coverage to BoardTest (3 new tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Robert Grayson
message:
Add Docker setup and configurable dev/test database

Dockerize the app with multi-stage Dockerfile, docker-compose with
Postgres, and release module for migrations. Make DB credentials and
port configurable via environment variables for container use while
preserving defaults for local development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
